name: wertis-kolektor
description: WERTIS — asystent magazyniera na kolektor (Subiekt GT). Monorepo: web (React/Vite/Tailwind/shadcn) + server (Fastify/SQLite/worker).

scripts.build: npm -w web run build && npm -w server run build
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build:web && npx wrangler pages deploy web/dist --project-name wertis-kolektor
